t_ch: 你觉得如何？
t_en: What do you think of this place?

t_ch: 谢谢你，我很喜欢。
t_en: Thank you, I like it.

t_ch: 可惜，天空已经不再属于我了。也许有一天，我会回到它的怀抱中，但那一定会是我最后一次翱翔。
t_en: It's a shame. The stars no longer belong to me. Perhaps one day I shall feel their embrace once again, but it will undoubtedly be the day of my last flight.

t_ch: 有空便来看看吧。
t_en: Come and have a look whenever you can.

t_ch: 好的，谢谢你的邀请。
t_en: I will. Thank you for your invitation.

t_ch: 不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
t_en: I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.

t_ch: 希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
t_en: I hope you all cherish one another.

t_ch: 天空真是高远啊…
t_en: The heavens really are boundless...

t_ch: 不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
t_en: I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.

t_ch: 希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
t_en: I hope you all cherish one another.

t_ch: 刚刚三月七给我看了一些玩偶，都是按照列车组成员的长相做的吧？非常可爱。
t_en: March 7th just showed me some dolls that were made to look like the members of the Express crew. They're adorable.

t_ch: 是的，我非常喜欢。
t_en: I agree. I love them too.

t_ch: 这让我想起了许多往事…
t_en: This brings back a lot of memories...

t_ch: 我是军人出身，也没什么照顾小孩子的经验。晴霓小的时候，我没有足够的时间陪她，又担心她一个人非常寂寞，就给她买了一大堆毛绒玩偶。
t_en: I come from a military background, so I don't have much experience when it comes to caring for children. When Qingni was a child, I rarely had time for her. I often worried about her feeling very lonely, so I bought her a lot of dolls.

t_ch: 后来有一段时间，有人问她一个人在家害不害怕，她还骄傲地说：「我不怕，我有很多毛绒玩偶妈妈！」搞得天舶司的下属们都在偷笑。
t_en: I remember someone asked her once if she ever felt afraid being home by herself, and she proudly responded: "I'm not afraid! I've got lots of doll mommies!" Needless to say, the Sky-Faring Commission was very entertained.

t_ch: 现在想想，也挺对不起她的…虽然她自己倒不在意，还经常提起这事儿。
t_en: ...Thinking back, even if she wasn't too affected by my absence, I do feel guilty.

t_ch: 看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
t_en: The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.

t_ch: 有可爱的玩偶…
t_en: Those dolls are adorable...

t_ch: 看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
t_en: The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.

t_ch: 刚才遇到姬子小姐，和她聊了一会儿。没想到她这么内行。
t_en: I just bumped into Himeko. We got chatting, and, well... I never knew she was such an expert.

t_ch: 你们聊了什么？
t_en: What did you talk about?

t_ch: 不算什么特别有趣的话题，都是航天技术相关的…只是我本来担心星槎的原理不好理解，没想到姬子一听就懂。
t_en: Oh, nothing too interesting — space flight technologies... I was worried that the principles of the starskiff would be hard for Himeko to comprehend — I never imagined she'd grasp it so easily.

t_ch: 不过说到底，我也没怎么深入接触过技术工作，真要论起来，搞不好她的理论知识储备比我还丰富。
t_en: I'm afraid I haven't had much exposure to technical fields — perhaps she has a better theoretical understanding than myself.

t_ch: 她肯定欢迎你常来找她聊天。
t_en: I'm sure she'd be keen to continue the conversation.

t_ch: 我一定常来。
t_en: Well, then I'll definitely come by more often...

t_ch: 毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
t_en: ...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.

t_ch: 姬子小姐是内行啊…
t_en: I never knew Himeko was such an expert.

t_ch: 我一定会常来。
t_en: I'll definitely come by more often...

t_ch: 毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
t_en: ...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.

t_ch: 我刚才似乎看到了一群虚空鲸从窗外飞过。
t_en: I think I just saw a group of void song whales fly past the window.

t_ch: 可惜你不在，让我一人独享了这难得的美景。
t_en: It's a shame you weren't here to see them — I prefer to witness such rare sights with others.

t_ch: 我也见过几次。
t_en: I've seen them a few times before.

t_ch: 说起来，罗浮上也曾有类似的生灵。但它们并非在空中遨游，而是生活在水中，叫做「渊兽」。
t_en: That reminds me, there were similar creatures that lived on the Luofu... They didn't travel freely through the heavens though — they lived in water. We called them depth crawlers.

t_ch: 后来，在三劫时代，罗浮的生态环境骤变，这些巨大而温和的生灵首当其冲，消失在了历史的长河中。
t_en: Later, during the Three Sufferings Era, the Luofu's ecosystem underwent a sudden change. These gentle giants bore the brunt of the change, and forever disappeared down the river of time.

t_ch: 小时候，我在画册上见到渊兽，便和家里人吵着要去看，他们却说，渊兽几千年前就已经灭绝了。
t_en: I remember seeing a picture of a depth crawler in my childhood — I insisted to my parents that we had to go and see them... My parents told me how they had been extinct for thousands of years.

t_ch: 我为此难过了很久，直到家人为了安抚我，带我搭星槎去看虚空鲸…那是我第一次看到虚空鲸群，真的很美。
t_en: I was so sad that my parents decided to take me on a starskiff to see the void song whales. That was the first time I'd ever laid eyes upon them... Such miraculous creatures.

t_ch: 现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
t_en: Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...

t_ch: 似乎看到了虚空鲸……
t_en: I think I just saw a void song whale...

t_ch: 现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
t_en: Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...

t_ch: 能陪我在舷窗前站一会儿吗？什么都不要说…只是陪我站一会儿。
t_en: Will you stand with me by the window a little while? No need to talk...

t_ch: 谢谢你…即使身在列车之中，置身事外地凝望着星海，也会突然感到有些不安……
t_en: Thank you... I know I'm standing safely here on the Express, but sometimes gazing out at such a vast sea of stars makes me feel a little uneasy...

t_ch: 能有个人陪在我身边，就像以前在天上那样，我就能平静很多…谢谢你……
t_en: Having someone by my side calms me — it's always been the case... Thank you.

t_ch: 你还好吗？
t_en: Are you all right?

t_ch: 别担心，我没事。可能…我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
t_en: Don't worry, it's nothing. Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.

t_ch: 能陪我站一会儿吗…
t_en: Will you stand here with me for a little while?

t_ch: 我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
t_en: Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.

t_ch: 这些日子，你帮了罗浮，也帮了我很多忙。于公于私，我都应该感谢你……
t_en: My time with you has been a great help to the Luofu, and a great help to me. I want to say thank you, both publicly and privately.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，收下这些吧。这是我代表天舶司赠与你的谢礼，希望你能够善加利用。
t_en: So... thank you, {NICKNAME}. Take these. On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I'd like to offer you this gift of thanks. I hope you can put them to good use.

t_ch: 谢谢，倒也不必如此正式。
t_en: That's very kind of you, but you needn't be so formal.

t_ch: 抱歉，我并不是和你打官腔。一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了……
t_en: Sorry, I don't mean to sound so formal. Once you reach my age, it's difficult to make new friends...

t_ch: 所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
t_en: ...which is why I treasure our friendship.

t_ch: 接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
t_en: From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...

t_ch: 想送你件礼物…
t_en: I have a gift for you...

t_ch: 一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了…
t_en: Once you reach my age, it becomes difficult to make new friends...

t_ch: 所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
t_en: ...which is why I treasure our friendship.

t_ch: 接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
t_en: From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，只要逃到这儿，别说丹鼎司，神策府的人都别想抓住我～
t_en: Hehe, now that I've made it this far, the Alchemy Commission and the Seat of Divine Foresight have no chance of catching me...

t_ch: 你好，丹鼎司来抓你了。
t_en: Alchemy Commission! Open Up!

t_ch: 丹、丹鼎司？！
t_en: A—Alchemy Commission!?

t_ch: 原来是{NICKNAME}你啊，吓我一跳。
t_en: It's you, {NICKNAME}! Are you trying to scare me to death?

t_ch: 我来抓你了。
t_en: Caught you!

t_ch: 嗯？听声音我就知道是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Huh? Hmph, I know your voice, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 明明是你邀请我的，还要这样平白无故吓人，真是的……
t_en: It was you who invited me. Why you gotta scare me like that? Honestly...

t_ch: 不如你快快告诉本小姐，列车什么时候出发？
t_en: Hey, how about you tell me when the Express is departing?

t_ch: 这得问列车长。
t_en: For that, you gotta ask the conductor.

t_ch: 列车长？就是那个戴上帽子比我高但其实比我矮的可爱小家伙吗？
t_en: The conductor? You mean that cuddly-looking creature, right? The one that's shorter than me if you don't count the hat?

t_ch: 看它优哉游哉的样子，就知道这列车一时半会儿还走不了。
t_en: Judging by how bored they look, my guess is we won't be leaving any time soon.

t_ch: 列车被将军扣留了。
t_en: The Express has been detained by the general.

t_ch: 什么？！将军不会已经算到我会乘坐星穹列车逃跑了吧？
t_en: What!? Does that mean the general knows I'm trying to escape on the Astral Express?

t_ch: 那可不行，你们再这样优哉游哉下去，肯定走不了了。
t_en: This won't do — you guys need to stop waltzing around and get us out of here!

t_ch: 你就这么想走吗？
t_en: Looky here, someone is in a rush to leave.

t_ch: 你可千万别误会，我不是真的想要离开罗浮一去不回…至少现在不想。
t_en: Don't misunderstand — I don't wanna leave the Luofu forever... at least not right now.

t_ch: 既然是散心嘛，早点走，早点回来～
t_en: I just wanted to head out early and get back early...

t_ch: 不过凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
t_en: ...I don't wanna give the Alchemy Commission time to discover my itinerary, that's all.

t_ch: 这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
t_en: Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.

t_ch: 谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
t_en: Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~

t_ch: 我会好好保守秘密的。
t_en: Your secrets are safe with me.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不然的话，下次你就见不到这么可爱的神医大人啦。
t_en: Hehe, they better be... or I won't be coming back!

t_ch: 没人会追到这里来吧……
t_en: Nobody will think to come looking here...

t_ch: 反正凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
t_en: Doesn't matter how much the Alchemy Commission racks its brain, they'll never guess where I've gone.

t_ch: 这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
t_en: Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.

t_ch: 谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
t_en: Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~

t_ch: 我会好好保守秘密的。
t_en: Your secrets are safe with me.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不然的话，你就见不到这么可爱的神医大人啦。
t_en: Hehe, they better be... or I won't be coming back!

t_ch: 听病人说，有很多星际旅客不习惯长途旅行，在旅行过程中突发症状。
t_en: I've heard patients say that interstellar travelers are prone to sudden illness if they're on the road for too long.

t_ch: 所以，我就给你们带了一些应急药，已经交给列车长啦～
t_en: That's why I brought you all some emergency medication — I've given it to the conductor.

t_ch: 真是太贴心了。
t_en: You're too kind.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，药嘛，有备无患，肯定能用得上。
t_en: Hehe, can't do without medicine. It's always better to be prepared.

t_ch: 其实列车上有。
t_en: We have our own stocks.

t_ch: 我听列车长说过啦，不过，多一些药有备无患嘛。
t_en: Yeah, yeah, the conductor mentioned, but it never hurts to have more than you need, right?

t_ch: 备好了应急药物，还得掌握药品的用途及使用方法，我也教给列车长啦～
t_en: Having stocks is one thing, but knowing a medicine's usage and application is another. I briefed the conductor on the instructions!

t_ch: 你好像很喜欢帕姆。
t_en: You really seem to like Pom-Pom.

t_ch: 没错！帕姆真是太可爱了。
t_en: How can you not! Pom-Pom's so cute!

t_ch: 帕姆学会了吗？
t_en: Did Pom-Pom understand everything?

t_ch: 帕姆听得特别仔细，是一个合格的列车长。
t_en: Pom-Pom listened to the instructions very carefully — they must be a very capable conductor.

t_ch: 其实，我还想跟列车长再多聊聊。要不，下次我再带点儿应急药过来？
t_en: In fact, I miss chatting to Pom-Pom already. How about I bring some more of that emergency medicine again next time?

t_ch: 列车要装不下了。
t_en: I don't think it will all fit on the Express.

t_ch: 也对哦…那我想想还有什么帕姆喜欢的。
t_en: Hmm, you might be right... What else does Pom-Pom like?

t_ch: 可以和它聊聊别的。
t_en: Chats don't require gifts.

t_ch: 列车长看上去还很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
t_en: I guess... Oh, the conductor likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~

t_ch: 给列车带了些备用药……
t_en: I've prepared some medicine for the Express...

t_ch: 我在禁邸后面的小院子里养了好多药草，颇有心得。
t_en: I've been cultivating medicinal herbs in the Forbidden Residence's rear courtyard. I'm becoming quite the expert.

t_ch: 感觉列车长很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
t_en: The conductor really likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我来当「列车医生」，咱们今晚就逃离罗浮吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why don't you guys let me be the resident doctor on the Express! Let's escape the Luofu this evening!

t_ch: 先让我想想该准备些什么……
t_en: Just let me think about what to pack...

t_ch: 这里有貘馍卷吗？
t_en: Do you have tuskpir wraps here?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 有姬子的咖啡。
t_en: We've got Himeko's coffee.

t_ch: 我是在问貘馍卷啦。
t_en: I'm asking about tuskpir wraps!

t_ch: 星槎海倒是有得卖，但现在去也来不及了。
t_en: They sell them in Starskiff Haven, but there's no time to go there now.

t_ch: 算了算了，有别的也行，这里有黄石乳酪洋芋条吗？
t_en: Never mind, I'm sure there'll be other things I like. Do you have Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries here?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 有姬子的咖啡。
t_en: We've got Himeko's coffee.

t_ch: 姬子的咖啡啊…之前本小姐来列车时喝过…跟药水一个味道，我不喜欢。
t_en: Himeko's coffee? I tried it when I came aboard the Express — yuck! Tastes like medicine.

t_ch: …那饮料呢，浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶有吗？
t_en: ...What about drinks? Puffergoat milk? Immortal's Delight?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 有姬子的咖啡。
t_en: We've got Himeko's coffee.

t_ch: 都说了本小姐不喜欢啊！
t_en: I told you, I don't like it!

t_ch: 列车上怎么一点儿仙舟美食都没有呢？算了，我们今晚不出发了，请允许我辞去「列车医生」的职务。
t_en: So there aren't ANY Xianzhou delicacies on the Express? Ugh, forget about escaping the Luofu — I formally resign from my post as resident doctor on the Express...

t_ch: 下次我再准备一些仙舟美食吧。
t_en: Next time I'll stock up on Xianzhou delicacies.

t_ch: 好呀，让我来一起准备，你们肯定也会喜欢的。
t_en: Great! I'll help — you'll love what I've got in mind.

t_ch: 咱们今晚就走吧……
t_en: Let's go tonight.

t_ch: 真是舍不得仙舟美食啊。
t_en: I really can't survive without Xianzhou delicacies.

t_ch: 除了貘馍卷、黄石乳酪洋芋条、浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶，我还想要蒜苗五花肉、脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、陈婆豆腐、紫芋扣肉、鲜奶热炒、白灼鳞虾……
t_en: Tuskpir wraps, Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries, puffergoat milk, and Immortal's Delight aside, I also miss Garlic-infused Pork, Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, Granny Chen's Tofu, Purple Taro with Pork, Fresh Milk Stir Fry, and Braised Prawns...

t_ch: …刚才你们的列车长是不是咽了一下口水？
t_en: ...Did the conductor just lick their lips?

t_ch: 啊，说得我自己都饿了……
t_en: Even speaking about all this is making me hungry...

t_ch: 你来看看我是不是长高了？我觉得应该是高了一丢丢。
t_en: Do you think I'm taller? I swear I've grown a smidge.

t_ch: 是长高了。
t_en: Sure, you're a little taller.

t_ch: 那就好，本小姐肯定是长高了。
t_en: That's good. I knew I'd gotten taller.

t_ch: 比之前矮。
t_en: You're shorter than before.

t_ch: 不会吧？你是故意骗我的。
t_en: You've gotta be kidding me?

t_ch: 看不出来…
t_en: I can't tell.

t_ch: 我才不信你，我肯定长高了～
t_en: I don't believe you! I've definitely grown taller.

t_ch: 穿过玉界门来到星穹列车，就会经历一段失重，而失重是能让人长高的！
t_en: I passed through the Jade Gate on my way to the Astral Express. The Jade Gate makes you weightless, and weightlessness can make people grow taller!

t_ch: 重力是往下的，长高是往上的，只要常来星穹列车，我肯定能长高～
t_en: Gravity means down, growing means up! As long as I keep visiting the Astral Express, I'm bound to grow taller.

t_ch: 听上去是有科学原理的。
t_en: Sounds pretty scientific.

t_ch: 不会只是心理作用吧？
t_en: Are you sure that's not just all in your head?

t_ch: …等等，突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长会长高吗？
t_en: Wait a minute... I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?

t_ch: 应该不会。
t_en: I don't think so.

t_ch: 不行不行，但我还是应该对自己有信心。
t_en: Ah! No, no — I need to believe in myself!

t_ch: 应该可以。
t_en: I think so.

t_ch: 那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
t_en: Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!

t_ch: 你看看我是不是长高了……
t_en: What do you think? Have I grown taller?

t_ch: 突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长还会长高吗？
t_en: I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?

t_ch: 应该不会。
t_en: I don't think so.

t_ch: …不长了？
t_en: ...A—Are you sure?

t_ch: 我还是应该对自己有信心。
t_en: No, no — I need to believe in myself!

t_ch: 应该会吧。
t_en: I think so.

t_ch: 那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
t_en: Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!

t_ch: 不知道为什么，从列车上回去之后，我开始做梦了。
t_en: I don't know why, but since I left the Express, I started having dreams.

t_ch: 我原本不做梦的。现在开始做起到处旅行的梦，一定是被关的太久了。
t_en: I dreamed about travel. I must've been locked away too long...

t_ch: 在梦里，我甚至变高了……
t_en: I remember I was really high up...

t_ch: 日有所思夜有所梦。
t_en: Dreams are a window to your inner thoughts.

t_ch: 哎呀，我刚才说的「变高」不是那个意思。
t_en: Ugh, it's not what you think! I wasn't dreaming about getting taller...

t_ch: 我是说，在梦里我会飞，飞得很高很高。
t_en: ...I was dreaming about flying!

t_ch: 梦境都是不真实的。
t_en: Dreams aren't real.

t_ch: 你说的倒也没错，毕竟，我甚至梦见自己会飞。
t_en: *sigh* You're right, I dreamed I was flying after all.

t_ch: 梦里有我吗？
t_en: Was I in your dream?

t_ch: 没有。我梦见自己飞得很高很高，哪还看得见你。
t_en: Nope. I was super high up — how could I see you from up there?

t_ch: 梦里的我想去哪儿就去哪儿，可自由了，真羡慕她呀。
t_en: I can go wherever I want in my dreams — I'm completely free... almost makes me envious of myself.

t_ch: …可惜我还没有睡够，就被人给叫醒了。
t_en: ...Needless to say, someone woke me up, as always.

t_ch: 今天做个好梦吧。
t_en: I wish you pleasant dreams this evening.

t_ch: 今晚肯定能做个好梦。
t_en: Thanks! I feel like I've got some lined up.

t_ch: 最近我又做梦了……
t_en: I've been dreaming lately.

t_ch: 虽然梦里想去哪儿就去哪儿，但是梦醒了之后总感觉空落落的。
t_en: Even though I can go wherever I want in my dreams, I always feel a bit empty when I wake up.

t_ch: …明明是那么幸福的梦，为什么醒来只会流出悲伤的眼泪呢？
t_en: ...My dreams are happy, so why do I always end up crying when they're over?

t_ch: 搞不懂，不想了不想了……
t_en: I don't get it... never mind...

t_ch: 本小姐刚才还找你呢，正好你来了。
t_en: I was just looking for you, and here you are.

t_ch: 仙舟上有些「石头」药材呢，能研磨成粉，顺着水喝下去能够镇心安神、温肺定喘。
t_en: The Xianzhou has a type of medicinal stone that can be ground into a fine powder and mixed with water. Drinking it calms the nerves and warms the lungs.

t_ch: 另有些漂亮的「石头」，光是放在身边，就能让人舒畅心胸、愉悦精神。
t_en: There are also beautiful stones that can bring soothing happiness just by being around them.

t_ch: 来，给你拿着～
t_en: Here, take these~

t_ch: 谢谢你，我已经开始愉悦了。
t_en: Thank you, I feel happier already.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，快拿着吧。
t_en: Hehe, here you go.

t_ch: 请你拿走，这我不能收下！
t_en: That's too generous of you. I don't deserve them.

t_ch: 但是你却把自己的口袋打开了……
t_en: But you opened your pockets...

t_ch: 我真的不能收下呀……
t_en: I really can't accept them...

t_ch: 哎呀，别客气，拿着吧。
t_en: Ah! Don't be so polite, take them!

t_ch: 既然都说到这个份上了……
t_en: Well, since you insist...

t_ch: 对呀对呀，就别再拒绝了嘛！
t_en: That's more like it, now don't say no again!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
t_en: Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.

t_ch: 你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
t_en: If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.

t_ch: 我给你带了点儿好东西！
t_en: I've got something good for you!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
t_en: Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.

t_ch: 你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
t_en: If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.

t_ch: 又见面了，怎么样，最近有和呜呜伯聊天吗？
t_en: We meet again. How have you been? Chatted with any Wubbaboo lately?

t_ch: 我有些问题想问你…
t_en: I have some questions for you...

t_ch: 尽管问吧！只要是和珍稀物种有关的，我知无不言！
t_en: Ask away! As long as it's about rare species, I'll tell you everything I know!

t_ch: 为什么有个呜呜伯长得特别大？
t_en: Why is there one really big Wubbaboo?

t_ch: 呜呜伯在生长过程中有概率突变，块头会急速增大，不过这种概率很低。
t_en: Wubbaboo has a chance to mutate as they grow and can rapidly increase in size, but that possibility is very low.

t_ch: 至于你说的那家伙啊…如果说呜呜伯们是一个大家庭的话，它就是当之无愧的家长。
t_en: As for the one you mentioned... If Wubbaboos are one big family, then such an individual would definitely be the parent.

t_ch: 呜呜伯都在哪儿出没？
t_en: Where are Wubbaboos usually found?

t_ch: 除了站长和黑塔女士的办公室，它们哪儿都去……
t_en: They go everywhere apart from Madam Herta's and the lead researcher's offices.

t_ch: 偷偷告诉你，它们喜欢去人少的地方待着。
t_en: I'll let you in on a secret — They like to be away from people.

t_ch: 你喜欢和呜呜伯聊天吗？
t_en: Do you enjoy chatting with Wubbaboo?

t_ch: 那当然啦，在你来之前，空间站里只有我能听懂它们在说什么。
t_en: Of course. I was the only one who could understand them on the space station before you got here.

t_ch: 那种孤独的感觉…哎，实在太可怜啦，所以我没事就会陪它们聊会儿。
t_en: That lonely feeling... *sigh* I feel so bad for them. That's why I chat with them whenever I can.

t_ch: 而且跟它们聊天还挺有趣的！你有机会的话也去找它们聊聊吧。
t_en: And they're pretty fun to talk to! You should try it when you've got the chance.

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: That's all questions I have.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I better leave you alone.

t_ch: 好哦，以后还有什么和珍稀物种有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
t_en: Cool. Come find me again if you have questions about rare species.

t_ch: 是你啊，年轻人。有什么事儿吗？
t_en: It's you, young one. How can I help you?

t_ch: 我有一些问题…
t_en: I have some questions...

t_ch: 希拉还好吗？
t_en: Is Sheila doing well?

t_ch: 这要看你如何定义「好」与「不好」了。
t_en: It depends on how you define "well."

t_ch: 她现在并不记得之前发生的事，也没什么烦恼，算是「过得很好」吧。
t_en: She doesn't remember what happened before and doesn't have anything to worry about, so I'd say she is "doing well."

t_ch: 我好像又看到希拉了。
t_en: I think I saw Sheila again.

t_ch: 嗯，她是法政科的向导，法政科的工作可少不了她。
t_en: Yes. She's a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and the Department can't function without her.

t_ch: 不过，你应该也知道了，现在的她已经不是原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>号了。
t_en: But you probably also know she is no longer Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>.

t_ch: 你以后有什么打算？
t_en: What are your plans?

t_ch: 人老了，我也没什么追求了，平平淡淡也挺好。
t_en: I'm getting old, and I don't have much that I want anymore. A peaceful life is good enough.

t_ch: 有空的话，或许会培养一下后辈吧，我听说…有些年轻科员对研发仿生人的事很感兴趣。
t_en: I might train some students if I have the time. I heard... that some young researchers are apparently very interested in working on androids.

t_ch: 有机会的话，我想向他们传授点心得…哎，毕竟每个人都有自己的遗憾。
t_en: Given an opportunity, I would like to teach them a thing or two... Ahh, after all, everyone has regrets.

t_ch: 我没有问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 谢谢你的解答，我没有问题了。
t_en: Thank you. I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 好的孩子，以后有空可以多多来聊聊。
t_en: Good. Do come back more often to chat with me, child.

t_ch: 又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
t_en: We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...

t_ch: 你有什么事情…吗？
t_en: How... can I help you?

t_ch: 我有些事情想问你…
t_en: I have a few questions for you...

t_ch: 是…哪个领域方面的知识？我不是通识类学者……
t_en: In what field of study? I am not a general scholar...

t_ch: 如果我回答不上来，还是请你去询问别的科员吧。
t_en: If I can't answer your questions, please ask the other researchers.

t_ch: 你喜欢猫吗？
t_en: Do you like cats?

t_ch: 咦？你怎么知道？
t_en: Huh? How did you know that?

t_ch: 猫猫啊…谁会不喜欢猫猫呢，可爱又迷人…它们的呼噜声还有安眠的效果。
t_en: Cats... How can anyone resist cats? They are so cute and charming, and their purring even helps with sleep.

t_ch: 可惜我没时间养猫…不过我收藏了很多猫猫的视频、贴纸、照片什么的，平时拿出来看看就觉得特别开心。
t_en: Pity I have no time to look after a real cat... But I collected lots of cat videos, stickers, and photos. Just looking at them makes me happy.

t_ch: 你一直在做星神相关的研究？
t_en: You've always been researching Aeons?

t_ch: 嗯，都是些纸面功夫…文献研究什么的。
t_en: Mmm, but it's all a bit superficial, like reading and writing research papers.

t_ch: 关于星神的一切我都很感兴趣，就是要看的资料实在太多了…不知道什么时候才能看完。
t_en: I am very interested in everything related to the Aeons, but there are too many materials to read... I don't know when I can finish them all.

t_ch: 有什么推荐的书吗？
t_en: Do you have any books to recommend?

t_ch: 书？我看的书…还算多，不过都是和星神有关的文献。
t_en: Books? I do read... a lot, but those books are all related to Aeons.

t_ch: 《星神的失落——银河民俗考》丛书挺不错的，通俗易懂…就是篇幅长了点……
t_en: The series The Fall of The Aeons – A Discussion on Cosmic Traditions is pretty good and easy to understand. It's just a bit long...

t_ch: 《银河神话举隅：神话中的星神内涵叙略》也不错，你有空的话可以看看。
t_en: Examples of Cosmic Legends: A Collection of Aeon References in Myths is also quite good. You can try that book when you have time.

t_ch: 我应该没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't think I have anything to ask.

t_ch: 那就暂时不打扰你了。
t_en: I will leave you to your work for now.

t_ch: 嗯，如果你还有什么和星神有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
t_en: Okay. You can come find me again if you have any other questions about the Aeons.

t_ch: 无论是来自裂缝深渊中的敌人，还是来自不轨人心的算计。
t_en: Whether they are enemies from the abyss or people with ill intentions...

t_ch: 只要我还在空间站一日，就不会允许那些孽障在黑塔大人的地盘肆意撒野！
t_en: So long as I'm in the space station, I will never let them ravage the territory of Madam Herta!

t_ch: 倘若非要凌踏这片科学的净土，那么就先从我，卡波特身上跨过去吧！
t_en: If they are to trample on this pure land of science, they'll have to go through me first!

t_ch: 你在这里做什么？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 哦！又是一位迷失之人。不要担心，不要着急，我会为你指引道路。
t_en: Oh! Here's another lost soul. Don't worry. I'll show you the way.

t_ch: 我叫卡波特，是界种科的科员。但还有另一重身份，更为重要——
t_en: My name is Capote. I'm a member of the Department of Ecology, but my other identity is even more important...

t_ch: 那就是黑塔大人最忠实的追随者！
t_en: I am a die-hard fan of Madam Herta!

t_ch: 我在这里，就是想要为这座空间站，也是为了黑塔大人，做出一点微薄的努力。
t_en: I'm here to make my humble contributions to this space station, as well as to Madam Herta.

t_ch: 虽然我没有办法与孽障搏斗，助力复兴之路的铺设……
t_en: Though I cannot fight against these horrors and lay out a road to revival...

t_ch: 但我会通过我的语言，去指引每一个，就像是你这样，迷失在慌乱之中的人。
t_en: But with my words, I will guide all those who are lost and in a panic like yourself.

t_ch: 你能为我提供什么帮助吗？
t_en: How can you help me?

t_ch: 帮助？对没错，你看上去的确需要一些小小的帮助。
t_en: Help? Right, you do look like you need some help.

t_ch: 从你的眼神里，我能看出焦躁不安。这是一种来源于恐惧的情绪，我能理解。
t_en: I can see anxiety in your eyes. This emotion originates from fear. I can understand it.

t_ch: 而我，将会为你拨开这层心灵上的迷雾。这也是我能为黑塔大人，做出的微小贡献。
t_en: And I will clear the uncertainty in your heart. This is the least I can do for Madam Herta.

t_ch: 来吧！尽情地倾诉吧！把你的困扰、苦痛，统统都告知我，让我来化解它们吧！
t_en: Come! Confess it all to me! Tell me all your frustrations and pain, and let me soothe them for you!

t_ch: 咳咳…当然，这些只是心灵上的援助。如果真的感到不适，还是需要找正规医疗途径。
t_en: *cough* Of course, this is just psychological help. If you feel any real discomfort, please seek out a medical doctor.

t_ch: 我还有些事情需要问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 有多少人被你化解过苦难？
t_en: How many people have had their pain "soothed" by you?

t_ch: 我不是一个喜欢为自己贴金揽功的人，希望你能明白这一点。
t_en: I'm not someone who likes to reap benefits for myself, and I hope you understand that.

t_ch: 但既然你主动发问，我还是为你解答——毕竟我生而为人的职责，就是解答他人的困惑！
t_en: But since you asked, I will answer — After all, my life's duty is to dispel others' confusion!

t_ch: 你看到我们身旁那些粉丝的目光没？那炽热灼灼的眼神，就是被化解苦难之后的最好证明！
t_en: Do you see the burning gazes of the fans around us? Those passionate looks of rapture are the best evidence of having had their pains soothed!

t_ch: 她们已经看见了星辰，不再被阴翳笼罩双目。所以才能如此炽热地注视我…哦不，注视真理和现实啊！
t_en: They no longer have their eyes clouded and now see the stars, and that is how they are able to passionately look at me... I mean, at truth and reality!

t_ch: 你的动作好像被精心设计过…
t_en: The way you move seems to be deliberately designed...

t_ch: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
t_en: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

t_ch: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
t_en: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

t_ch: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
t_en: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

t_ch: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
t_en: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

t_ch: 对于这场入侵你怎么看？
t_en: What do you think about this invasion?

t_ch: 灾难！这就是一场纯纯粹粹、彻彻底底的灾难！
t_en: A disaster! An absolute, complete disaster!

t_ch: 虽然我知道，空间站近日人心惶惶，每个人对于这场入侵，都有不一样的看法。
t_en: I know that everyone on the space station is concerned these days and all hold different views regarding the invasion.

t_ch: 但我的眼中，只看到了粉丝们恐惧的脸庞——被泪水打湿的玫瑰固然有别样的韵味，但倘若馥郁的香气变为了苦涩的愁郁，那岂不是末日的光景？
t_en: However, I only see the horrified faces of my fans. Though roses moist with tears hold a special scent, it would be apocalyptic for such thick and sweet aromas to turn sour with sorrow.

t_ch: 所以，我更要坚定自我的职责——成为她们的引路明灯！
t_en: Therefore, I need to remain steadfast in my duty, and become their guiding light!

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 我没什么想要问的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to ask.

t_ch: 如果你心中还有困惑，可以随时来找我。当然也可以写信，我喜欢那样传统的交流方式。
t_en: If you still hold confusion in your heart, please, come find me anytime. Of course, you may also write to me. I like that kind of classical communication method.

t_ch: 信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
t_en: You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.

t_ch: 我还有些事情需要问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 有多少人被你化解过苦难？
t_en: How many people have had their pain "soothed" by you?

t_ch: 我不是一个喜欢为自己贴金揽功的人，希望你能明白这一点。
t_en: I'm not someone who likes to reap benefits for myself, and I hope you understand that.

t_ch: 但既然你主动发问，我还是为你解答——毕竟我生而为人的职责，就是解答他人的困惑！
t_en: But since you asked, I will answer — After all, my life's duty is to dispel others' confusion!

t_ch: 你看到我们身旁那些粉丝的目光没？那炽热灼灼的眼神，就是被化解苦难之后的最好证明！
t_en: Do you see the burning gazes of the fans around us? Those passionate looks of rapture are the best evidence of having had their pains soothed!

t_ch: 她们已经看见了星辰，不再被阴翳笼罩双目。所以才能如此炽热地注视我…哦不，注视真理和现实啊！
t_en: They no longer have their eyes clouded and now see the stars, and that is how they are able to passionately look at me... I mean, at truth and reality!

t_ch: 你的动作好像被精心设计过…
t_en: The way you move seems to be deliberately designed...

t_ch: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
t_en: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

t_ch: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
t_en: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

t_ch: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
t_en: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

t_ch: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
t_en: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

t_ch: 对于这场入侵你怎么看？
t_en: What do you think about this invasion?

t_ch: 灾难！这就是一场纯纯粹粹、彻彻底底的灾难！
t_en: A disaster! An absolute, complete disaster!

t_ch: 虽然我知道，空间站近日人心惶惶，每个人对于这场入侵，都有不一样的看法。
t_en: I know that everyone on the space station is concerned these days and all hold different views regarding the invasion.

t_ch: 但我的眼中，只看到了粉丝们恐惧的脸庞——被泪水打湿的玫瑰固然有别样的韵味，但倘若馥郁的香气变为了苦涩的愁郁，那岂不是末日的光景？
t_en: However, I only see the horrified faces of my fans. Though roses moist with tears hold a special scent, it would be apocalyptic for such thick and sweet aromas to turn sour with sorrow.

t_ch: 所以，我更要坚定自我的职责——成为她们的引路明灯！
t_en: Therefore, I need to remain steadfast in my duty, and become their guiding light!

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 我没什么想要问的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to ask.

t_ch: 如果你心中还有困惑，可以随时来找我。当然也可以写信，我喜欢那样传统的交流方式。
t_en: If you still hold confusion in your heart, please, come find me anytime. Of course, you may also write to me. I like that kind of classical communication method.

t_ch: 信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
t_en: You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.

t_ch: …嘿！别偷偷摸摸站在别人身边！你这样是很容易吓到人的！
t_en: ...Hey, don't come up to people all quietly like that! You are going to scare people!

t_ch: 哦…是{NICKNAME}啊。抱歉，我还以为是那些人过来了……
t_en: Oh... It's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I thought those people are here...

t_ch: 你有点神经紧张。
t_en: You seem rather nervous.

t_ch: 哎，别提了。还记得之前拉明娜干的好事吧？现在整个空间站的人，都把我视作过街老鼠，人人喊打！甚至以前那些自称永远不会离开后援会的科员，现在还带头找我麻烦！
t_en: Oh, it's terrible. Do you remember what Lamina did? Now everyone on the space station spites me and ostracizes me! Even those who said they would never leave my fan club are taking the lead in opposing me!

t_ch: 你瞧我现在这个倒霉样，不就是被他们给折腾的嘛！
t_en: I'm in such a pitiable state because of them!

t_ch: 那些人是谁？
t_en: Who are those people you're talking about?

t_ch: 曾经的波少粉丝后援会核心会员，现如今的卡波特头号抵制人员…哎，你也或多或少有听说的吧？在拉明娜那件事儿之后，大家对我的看法什么的。
t_en: The previous core members of the Master Capote Fan Club are now my biggest haters... You've heard about this, right? About how everyone views me after what happened with Lamina?

t_ch: 看你还是个明眼人，应该不会和他们一样不分青红皂白吧？
t_en: You look to be a smart cookie. You won't be as much of a brute as them, right?

t_ch: 我还有些事要给你说…
t_en: I still need to talk to you about something.

t_ch: 也好也好，只要不是无意义地谩骂和批判，我都会好好听着的。
t_en: Fine fine. I'll take it to heart as long as it's not pointless criticism and slander.

t_ch: 你应该自我反省…
t_en: You need to self-reflect more...

t_ch: 哎，{NICKNAME}。从那件事之后，我又何尝没有反省过自己的呢？可是那些人哪儿会听我讲话？在他们眼中，我已经是个不知悔改的罪人了。
t_en: Ahh, {NICKNAME}, have I not reflected upon my actions since then? But who amongst those people would listen to me? For them, I am already an unrepentant sinner.

t_ch: 我辜负了粉丝的期待，这件事我应该付出代价。可是一旦我在这件事上表达歉意，大家反而更加愤怒，觉得我只是继续在编造谎言而已……
t_en: I betrayed the fans' expectations and I agree I need to pay for that. However, once I showed any remorse on this matter, they got more angry and felt I was just making up lies again...

t_ch: 你应该为拉明娜道歉…
t_en: You need to apologize to Lamina...

t_ch: 这件事虽然是我的私事，但{NICKNAME}你也不是外人，我还是偷偷告诉你吧。
t_en: It's my personal business, but since you are hardly a stranger, I'll tell you something in secret.

t_ch: 最开始我当然很生气，毕竟这件事，她明明可以跟我商量嘛！闹得这么大，多不好下台啊……
t_en: Of course I was angry at first. She could have discussed this with me! It became such a huge mess, and it was so hard to sort out my public image...

t_ch: 但是经过我的深刻反思之后，我才意识到这个想法多么荒谬。如果遭遇无端压迫的人是我，想必应该也没有那份勇气去主动要求和对方谈一谈吧。
t_en: However, I realized how ludicrous my ideas were after I thought long and hard on them. If I were the one getting endlessly oppressed, then I probably also won't have the courage to actively approach the other party for a conversation.

t_ch: 当我意识到拉明娜的难处与勇气之后，我更加坚信了一件事——曾经的我，真是个不折不扣的混账。
t_en: When I realized Lamina's difficulties and her courage, I became more firmly convinced of one thing — I was a total jerk.

t_ch: 因此，我将自己的反省与思考都告诉了她。虽然拉明娜当时…并没有接受我的道歉，但我相信我的诚意一定可以传递给她的吧？
t_en: Therefore, I told her all about my introspection. Lamina didn't accept my apology there and then, but I believe she must have felt my sincerity.

t_ch: 重新做人是有点困难的。
t_en: It's a bit hard to start over again.

t_ch: 我的天，你是第一个站在我的立场为我考虑的人。{NICKNAME}，你真是我的人生挚友！要知道，大家伙儿都觉得我死不足惜，更别提允许我重新做人了！
t_en: My goodness, you are the first to see things from my perspective. {NICKNAME}, you are indeed my bosom friend! See, everyone else thinks I can't redeem myself even with death, let alone allow me to start over!

t_ch: 不过幸好，我的人生还不算彻底黯淡无光。毕竟我还拥有你，以及真正理解我的人。
t_en: Thankfully, my life is not completely devoid of light. After all, I still have you and those who really understand me.

t_ch: 虽然波少粉丝后援会解散了，但还是有少部分粉丝留了下来，成立了新的后援会。有了他们的支持，我肯定可以更快在空间站改头换面，让大家感受到我的决心的！
t_en: Though the Master Capote Fan Club had disbanded, a small number of fans stayed behind and formed a new club. With their support, I can definitely start all over again on the space station and let everyone feel my conviction!

t_ch: 我没有别的事情想和你说了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say to you.

t_ch: 我没有什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 和你聊了聊，感觉心里舒服痛快多了。之前我说话老是忍不住去端着架子，说些空话。现在能和你这样推心置腹地说说话，感觉倒是十分难得。
t_en: I feel a lot better after speaking to you. I used to always put up airs and talk big, but now that I can speak candidly with you, it's actually a rather rare experience.

t_ch: 谢谢你愿意听我讲话。如果之后你有需要，我也愿意随时倾听你的发言。
t_en: Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.

t_ch: 嘿，是你来啦？有什么我能帮上忙的就说，为朋友我卡波特都是两肋插刀的！
t_en: Oh, it's you! Tell me how I can help you. I, Capote, will do anything for my friend!

t_ch: 我还有些事要给你说…
t_en: I still need to talk to you about something.

t_ch: 也好也好，只要不是无意义地谩骂和批判，我都会好好听着的。
t_en: Fine fine. I'll take it to heart as long as it's not pointless criticism and slander.

t_ch: 你应该自我反省…
t_en: You need to self-reflect more...

t_ch: 哎，{NICKNAME}。从那件事之后，我又何尝没有反省过自己的呢？可是那些人哪儿会听我讲话？在他们眼中，我已经是个不知悔改的罪人了。
t_en: Ahh, {NICKNAME}, have I not reflected upon my actions since then? But who amongst those people would listen to me? For them, I am already an unrepentant sinner.

t_en: I betrayed the fans' expectations and I agree I need to pay for that. However, once I showed any remorse on this matter, they got more angry and felt I was just making up lies again...

t_en: You need to apologize to Lamina...

t_en: It's my personal business, but since you are hardly a stranger, I'll tell you something in secret.

t_ch: 但是经过我的深刻反思之后，我才意识到这个想法多么荒谬。如果遭遇无端压迫的人是我，想必应该也没有那份勇气去主动要求和对方谈一谈吧。
t_en: However, I realized how ludicrous my ideas were after I thought long and hard on them. If I were the one getting endlessly oppressed, then I probably also won't have the courage to actively approach the other party for a conversation.

t_en: Therefore, I told her all about my introspection. Lamina didn't accept my apology there and then, but I believe she must have felt my sincerity.

t_en: It's a bit hard to start over again.

t_ch: 我的天，你是第一个站在我的立场为我考虑的人。{NICKNAME}，你真是我的人生挚友！要知道，大家伙儿都觉得我死不足惜，更别提允许我重新做人了！
t_en: My goodness, you are the first to see things from my perspective. {NICKNAME}, you are indeed my bosom friend! See, everyone else thinks I can't redeem myself even with death, let alone allow me to start over!

t_en: Thankfully, my life is not completely devoid of light. After all, I still have you and those who really understand me.

t_en: Though the Master Capote Fan Club had disbanded, a small number of fans stayed behind and formed a new club. With their support, I can definitely start all over again on the space station and let everyone feel my conviction!

t_ch: 我没有别的事情想和你说了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say to you.

t_ch: 我没有什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 和你聊了聊，感觉心里舒服痛快多了。之前我说话老是忍不住去端着架子，说些空话。现在能和你这样推心置腹地说说话，感觉倒是十分难得。

t_ch: 谢谢你愿意听我讲话。如果之后你有需要，我也愿意随时倾听你的发言。
t_en: Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.

t_ch: 啊…是{NICKNAME}呀。好久不见，有什么我可以帮你…啊，不好意思，一不小心又回到了之前的「秘书」状态。
t_en: Ah... it's you, {NICKNAME}. Long time no see. What can I help you — Ah, sorry, I sometimes still revert to my old secretary mode.

t_ch: 现在的我，已经不需要扮演那个家伙的私人秘书了。虽然目前还在适应阶段，但我相信之后一定会做得更好的。
t_en: I don't need to play the role of that man's personal secretary anymore. It takes a bit of time to adjust, but I know I'll get better at it.

t_ch: 感觉你比以前有精神了。
t_en: It feels like you're a lot more energized than before.

t_ch: 刚开始还有些不适应的。毕竟从那样繁琐的工作中一下子脱身，多少有点难以找到自我的定位。
t_en: I did have some difficulties at first. After all, it was kind of hard to re-position myself when such a busy work schedule just suddenly stopped.

t_ch: 但很快我发现，曾经的波少粉丝，也和我有相同的情况。大家都是一下子被强行挖去了生命中的一个环节，难免会觉得空落落的。
t_en: But I soon realized many previous Capote fans were in the same boat as me. We all felt a part of our lives was forcibly taken from us, and we can't help but feel empty.

t_ch: 于是我们就联合了起来，定期开展座谈会，分享自己的生活和工作。现在大家都感觉状态好了很多呢。
t_en: So, we banded together and met up frequently to talk about our lives and work. Now everyone feels much better.

t_ch: 现在的生活感觉如何？
t_en: How does life feel nowadays?

t_ch: 感觉…很「新奇」吧？
t_en: Feels... "new," I guess?

t_ch: 最开始来到空间站的时候，我还多少抱有一些自我发展的规划。但是在做秘书的这段时间里，那些计划早就被磨灭得一干二净了。
t_en: I did have some plans for self-development when I first arrived at the space station, but those plans were all worn away during my time working as Capote's secretary.

t_ch: 现在重新将自己解放了出来，就好像第一次来到空间站的时候那样，看什么都是新崭崭的，觉得自己的未来有好多种可能。
t_en: Now that I'm free, I feel like I'm a newcomer at the space station once again. Everything seems so new and the future is so full of possibilities.

t_ch: 我还想和你聊聊。
t_en: I want to chat with you more.

t_ch: 关于卡波特…
t_en: About Capote...

t_ch: 其实他来找过我，而且态度…有些让我不适应。不是说他做了什么奇怪的事情啦！只是平日里都高高在上的人，一下子对自己低声下气，多少感觉有点…怪怪的。
t_en: He's actually been to see me, and his attitude was... a bit weird. I'm not saying he did anything funny, just... for someone who's usually so high and mighty to suddenly act so low feels really weird.

t_ch: 所以当他讲完自己的深刻反省以及对我的歉意之后，我一下子没能说出来一句话。
t_en: I couldn't even say anything when he stated how deeply he had reflected on himself and how sorry he was.

t_ch: 也不知道是自己已经从那段过去中彻底走了出来，所以不在意他的回应；还是说从没想过他会道歉，所以真正听到的时候有些诧异。
t_en: I don't know if I've totally put that time behind me and didn't care about what he could have said, or I never thought he'd apologize and was surprised he actually did it.

t_ch: 总之，我没有能说出一句话，也没有给出任何回应。
t_en: Anyways, I couldn't say anything to him and gave him zero responses.

t_ch: 不过事后想来，那时候的他确实露出了从没展示过的眼神。应该可以说是…「真诚」的眼神吧？希望他之后也可以保持这份真诚。
t_en: But now that I think about it, he did show a look that I had never seen on his face before. Maybe that's... a "sincere" look? I hope he can keep being so sincere in the future.

t_ch: 未来有什么打算？
t_en: What are your plans for the future?

t_ch: 虽…虽然之前一直在做一些琐碎的工作，但是好像不知不觉认识了很多其他科室的人。
t_en: Well... I've been doing mundane work all this time, but I somehow got to know lots of people in different departments.

t_ch: 可以说是因祸得福吧？曾经的那些卡波特粉丝后援会成员，有许多都是手里有独立研究项目的资深科员。
t_en: Maybe a bit of good luck actually came from this. Lots of the previous Capote Fan Club members are senior researchers with independent projects under their care.

t_ch: 因为平时和他们来往颇多，彼此也算是互相了解。经过引荐内推之后，也通过了几个研究项目的面试。大概之后，就会以「科员」的身份和你打招呼啦。
t_en: We knew each other because of our frequent interactions before. They got me to apply for some internal positions, and I managed to pass the interviews for a few projects. I'll probably be a "researcher" by the next time we meet.

t_ch: 你是个很有勇气的女孩。
t_en: You are a very brave person.

t_ch: 关于「勇气」这件事，我其实之前也很怀疑自己……
t_en: I don't know about being brave...

t_ch: 如果我真的是一个有勇气的人，是不是更应该在遭受压迫的时候，第一时间给他说出不呢？又或者是说早一点和他谈一谈，而不是以这样的方式画上句号呢？
t_en: If I really am brave, shouldn't I have said no to him the first time he oppressed me? Or should I have talked with him earlier, so that things wouldn't have to go down this way?

t_ch: 不过与其苛责自己做得还不够好，不如先坦率认可自己已经做出了改变吧？我最终选择了这样的方式与自己妥协，也算是与过去彻底告别了。
t_en: But instead of blaming myself for not having done enough, it's better to just admit that I've changed. I chose to face myself in this way and closed that chapter of my past.

t_ch: 没什么想聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 总之，谢谢你，愿意对我说这样的话。
t_en: Anyways, thank you for saying these things to me.

t_ch: 我没有什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 之后我就要着手准备项目研究的前期工作了，希望有机会可以再和你聊聊天。
t_en: I'm going to start preparing for the preliminary work of the research project now. Hope we get the chance to chat again in the future.

t_ch: 嗨，又见面了，这次是有什么事呢？
t_en: Hey, we meet again. What can I help you with?

t_ch: 我还想和你聊聊。
t_en: I want to chat with you more.

t_ch: 关于卡波特…
t_en: About Capote...

t_en: I couldn't even say anything when he stated how deeply he had reflected on himself and how sorry he was.

t_en: I don't know if I've totally put that time behind me and didn't care about what he could have said, or I never thought he'd apologize and was surprised he actually did it.

t_en: Anyways, I couldn't say anything to him and gave him zero responses.

t_ch: 不过事后想来，那时候的他确实露出了从没展示过的眼神。应该可以说是…「真诚」的眼神吧？希望他之后也可以保持这份真诚。
t_en: But now that I think about it, he did show a look that I had never seen on his face before. Maybe that's... a "sincere" look? I hope he can keep being so sincere in the future.

t_ch: 未来有什么打算？
t_en: What are your plans for the future?

t_ch: 虽…虽然之前一直在做一些琐碎的工作，但是好像不知不觉认识了很多其他科室的人。
t_en: Well... I've been doing mundane work all this time, but I somehow got to know lots of people in different departments.

t_ch: 可以说是因祸得福吧？曾经的那些卡波特粉丝后援会成员，有许多都是手里有独立研究项目的资深科员。
t_en: Maybe a bit of good luck actually came from this. Lots of the previous Capote Fan Club members are senior researchers with independent projects under their care.

t_ch: 因为平时和他们来往颇多，彼此也算是互相了解。经过引荐内推之后，也通过了几个研究项目的面试。大概之后，就会以「科员」的身份和你打招呼啦。
t_en: We knew each other because of our frequent interactions before. They got me to apply for some internal positions, and I managed to pass the interviews for a few projects. I'll probably be a "researcher" by the next time we meet.

t_ch: 你是个很有勇气的女孩。
t_en: You are a very brave person.

t_ch: 关于「勇气」这件事，我其实之前也很怀疑自己……
t_en: I don't know about being brave...

t_ch: 如果我真的是一个有勇气的人，是不是更应该在遭受压迫的时候，第一时间给他说出不呢？又或者是说早一点和他谈一谈，而不是以这样的方式画上句号呢？
t_en: If I really am brave, shouldn't I have said no to him the first time he oppressed me? Or should I have talked with him earlier, so that things wouldn't have to go down this way?

t_ch: 不过与其苛责自己做得还不够好，不如先坦率认可自己已经做出了改变吧？我最终选择了这样的方式与自己妥协，也算是与过去彻底告别了。
t_en: But instead of blaming myself for not having done enough, it's better to just admit that I've changed. I chose to face myself in this way and closed that chapter of my past.

t_ch: 没什么想聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 我没有什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 之后我就要着手准备项目研究的前期工作了，希望有机会可以再和你聊聊天。
t_en: I'm going to start preparing for the preliminary work of the research project now. Hope we get the chance to chat again in the future.

t_ch: 在宇宙中的感觉非常奇妙…罗浮对彦卿而言那么辽阔，但是在宇宙中，也不过是小小一隅而已。
t_en: Being surrounded by the universe feels... amazing. The Luofu feels like a small corner of something much, much bigger.

t_ch: 你喜欢列车上的景色吗？
t_en: Enjoying the view so far?

t_ch: 喜欢啊。以前偶尔会在生活中遇到不顺利之事，如今只要望向宇宙，就会意识到这些烦心事有多渺小……
t_en: Yeah! All the challenges of everyday life seem to disappear when you gaze out into the universe.

t_ch: 时常来列车散散心吧。
t_en: You should totally visit the Express more often. It's a great place to have even greater fun.

t_ch: 好呀，那就时常来叨扰老师了。
t_en: Alright! Then I'll be here to bother you more often in the future.

t_ch: 宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……
t_en: I bet there are so many opponents out there in the universe just waiting for me to find them...

t_ch: 宇宙中的感觉非常奇妙……
t_en: The universe is so miraculous...

t_ch: 宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……
t_en: I bet there are so many opponents out there in the universe just waiting for me to find them...

t_ch: 刚才和瓦尔特老师聊了一会儿，他讲了很多有趣的故事。
t_en: I was just talking to Mr. Yang — he told me some fascinating stories.

t_ch: 说来听听？
t_en: I'm all ears.

t_ch: 他说，有一柄「歼星大剑」，足有一百二十尺，唯有巨大的机器人才能挥舞得动。
t_en: He mentioned a <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword called Star Bane that only a giant robot could wield.

t_ch: 我当然知道自己再怎么厉害也用不了那把剑啦，但还是想见识见识啊……
t_en: Of course, I know I'd never be able to wield such a sword, but I'd still love to see it...

t_ch: 他说的是动画片吧…
t_en: He's probably talking about a cartoon or something...

t_ch: 动画片？原来不是真实存在的剑啊…但你不觉得这个思路其实是可行的吗？
t_en: Cartoon? So it's not a real sword!? But it could be real, right?

t_ch: 「歼星大剑」…嗯，回去讲给将军听听，也许他会愿意请工造司试试看吧。
t_en: Star Bane... Hmm, once I get back I'll talk to the general about it. Perhaps he'd be willing to get the Artisanship Commission involved?

t_ch: 一百二十尺的巨剑，光是想想都觉得激动！
t_en: A <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword! Just thinking about it makes me excited.

t_ch: 说到这个…老师，彦卿最近还注意到了一件事！
t_en: Speaking of which, I noticed something recently!

t_ch: 你注意到了什么呢？
t_en: Pray tell, what caught your eye?

t_ch: 你看外面，整艘罗浮是不是特别像一柄巨大的飞剑？这岂不是意味着，彦卿每天都在御剑飞行？
t_en: Look outside — don't you think the Luofu looks like a giant flying sword? So that would mean I'm flying around on a huge sword every day!

t_ch: 听过「歼星大剑」吗？
t_en: Have you heard of Star Bane?

t_ch: 你看外面，整艘罗浮是不是特别像一柄巨大的飞剑？这岂不是意味着，彦卿每天都在御剑飞行？
t_en: Look outside — don't you think the Luofu looks like a giant flying sword? So that would mean I'm flying around on a huge sword every day!

t_ch: 彦卿刚才去和丹恒老师聊天，但是…总感觉他不太爱说话。
t_en: I was just talking with Dan Heng, but... he never seems very interested in chatting.

t_ch: 老师，你知道丹恒老师对什么话题比较感兴趣吗？
t_en: Do you know any topics he'd be interested in?

t_ch: 智库。
t_en: The data bank.

t_ch: 刚刚也和丹恒老师聊起这个…
t_en: Funnily enough, that was a part of our conversation...

t_ch: 我问丹恒老师要去哪儿，他说要去智库查阅资料，然后就走进资料室了。
t_en: I asked Dan Heng where he was off to, and he said he was going to the data bank to look up some material. Then he walked straight into the Archives.

t_ch: 原本我还想着能多问几句的……
t_en: I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}我。
t_en: Me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 是呀，我刚刚也是问了丹恒老师才知道你在观景车厢。
t_en: Well, I did ask him where you were just now — that's how I knew you were in the Parlor Car.

t_ch: 原本我还想着能多问几句的……
t_en: I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...

t_ch: 列车。
t_en: The Express.

t_ch: 没错，我刚刚问他的就是这个！
t_en: That's exactly what I asked him about!

t_ch: 比如列车的构造之类的，但他都回答得好简洁……
t_en: I asked all about what the Express was made of, but his answers were super short.

t_ch: 那看起来并不是我选择的话题他不感兴趣，到底是为什么呢……
t_en: So if the topics I chose interest him... why is he still like that?

t_ch: 他性格内敛。
t_en: He's just a bit reserved.

t_ch: 他善于炼字。
t_en: He's good at keeping things brief.

t_ch: 原来是这样啊…老师这么说我就放心了。我原本还担心，是自己哪句话太冒失，惹他不开心了呢。
t_en: Oh, okay — I feel a bit better then. I was worried I spoke out of turn or upset him.

t_ch: 以后还是要多找丹恒老师聊聊天，也许聊得多了，他就能打开话匣子了吧。
t_en: I'll keep talking to him — maybe I can eventually unlock his chattier side!

t_ch: 丹恒老师不爱说话……
t_en: Master Dan Heng isn't fond of talking...

t_ch: 老师这么说我就放心了。我原本还担心，是自己哪句话太冒失，惹他不开心了呢。
t_en: I feel a bit better then. I was worried I spoke out of turn or upset him.

t_ch: 以后还是要多找丹恒老师聊聊天，也许聊得多了，他就能打开话匣子了吧。
t_en: I'll keep talking to him — maybe I can eventually unlock his chattier side!

t_ch: 老师，你们的列车长帕姆老师，到底是什么来头啊？
t_en: Where did the Express' conductor come from?

t_ch: 其实我也不知道…
t_en: Too bad I don't know either...

t_ch: 彦卿原本以为，帕姆老师和将军以前养的朔雪一样，既是可爱的吉祥物也是家人…但刚刚我才察觉到，帕姆老师身上，有一种强者才有的气息……
t_en: At first, I thought Pom-Pom was like the pet the general used to keep — Snowmoon. Y'know, a cute mascot who's also a member of the family...? Anyway, I soon realized that wasn't the case — Pom-Pom has a strong presence on the Express.

t_ch: 真的假的？
t_en: Is that so? Really!?

t_ch: 真的啊！老师不常用剑，可能还不熟悉剑客的气息吧？但我一眼就能看出来，这位帕姆老师绝非等闲之辈，造诣很可能在我之上。
t_en: Really! You don't use a sword, so I guess you wouldn't feel the presence of a swordsman in front of you... but after one look at Pom-Pom, I knew they weren't someone to be trifled with. I think they may be more masterful than myself.

t_ch: 等一下直接去问问帕姆老师好了…也许帕姆老师愿意和我过上几招呢。
t_en: I should go and ask Pom-Pom about it — maybe I could pick up a few tricks!

t_ch: 帕姆老师是何方神圣？
t_en: What's so special about Pom-Pom?

t_ch: 老师不常用剑，可能还不熟悉剑客的气息吧？但我可一眼就能看出来，这位帕姆老师绝非等闲之辈，剑术很可能在我之上。
t_en: You don't use a sword, so I guess you wouldn't feel the presence of a swordsman in front of you... but after one look at Pom-Pom, I knew they weren't someone to be trifled with. I think they may be more masterful than myself.

t_ch: 等一下直接去问问帕姆老师好了…也许帕姆老师愿意和我过上几招呢。
t_en: I should go and ask Pom-Pom about it — maybe I could pick up a few tricks!

t_ch: 刚才看了星穹列车上的智库…真是大受震撼。
t_en: I just saw the Astral Express' data bank... What a shock!

t_ch: 你看见什么了？
t_en: So, what caught your attention?

t_ch: 彦卿当然知道，这银河中有无数强者等待我去挑战…但在智库中实际看到这些资料，还是觉得颇为震撼。
t_en: Well, I knew the universe had countless opponents waiting for me to challenge them... but I saw some information in the data bank that astounded me.

t_ch: 那个叫做「贝洛伯格」的城市，明明只是一座末日孤城，却高手如云…等以后有时间，还希望能去那里看看。
t_en: That city — Belobog — it seems like such a lonely place and yet it's full of masterful fighters. When I get time, I want to take a look there.

t_ch: 现在就能带你去。
t_en: Well, I can take you there right now, if you're up for it.

t_ch: 现在还不行，我要学的东西还有很多。在罗浮上和人比试，输了也就输了。要是在域外输了，那可是丢将军的脸。
t_en: Now's not the time — there's still more to learn. If I lose to someone on the Luofu, it doesn't matter, but if I lose to an outsider, it would disgrace the general.

t_ch: 等过段时日，彦卿剑术大成，还请老师载我一程，去「贝洛伯格」见识见识那些雪国的高手们。
t_en: I want to spend some time honing my skills... Then, when the time's right, you can take me down, and we'll see what the masters of this snowy planet can do.

t_ch: 哎呀，光是想想，就觉得心潮澎湃。
t_en: Haha, just the thought of it gets my blood pumping!

t_ch: 智库里有很多强者……
t_en: There are many strong adversaries in the data bank.

t_ch: 等过段时日，彦卿剑术大成，还请老师载我一程，去「贝洛伯格」见识见识那些雪国的高手们。
t_en: I want to spend some time honing my skills... Then, when the time's right, you can take me down, and we'll see what the masters of this snowy planet can do.

t_ch: 哎呀，光是想想，就觉得心潮澎湃。
t_en: Haha, just the thought of it gets my blood pumping!

t_ch: 将军总是嘱咐彦卿，滴水之恩当以涌泉相报，即使是与朋友相处，也要礼数周到。
t_en: The general is always telling me that a drop of water should be repaid with a spring, and that even among friends, etiquette prevails.

t_ch: 我觉得，老师是我的朋友，可我却又拿不出算得上「涌泉相报」的答谢，很是苦恼。
t_en: You're a good friend, but I can't think of any "spring" to repay you with...

t_ch: 不过最近，我在打扫后院时，在朔雪以前住的兽栏中翻出了这些漂亮的石头…想来是朔雪当年藏在那里的吧？
t_en: Still, when I was clearing out the rear courtyard recently, I found these beautiful stones buried in the pen where Snowmoon used to live... I guess Snowmoon must've buried them there.

t_ch: 虽然不知道这些东西价值几何，但很是好看，拿来送给老师，也许是再合适不过的礼物了。
t_en: I don't know if they're worth anything, but they look pretty. Here, I think they'd make a nice gift for you.

t_ch: 往后，我还想常来列车上叨扰。希望那个时候，也能和老师们一起聊聊天、看看宇宙、吃些好吃的……
t_en: I think I'll be coming to the Express more often in the future... The next time I'm here, I want to have more conversations, watch the universe, and eat some good food together with all of you!

t_ch: 将军说要礼数周到……
t_en: The general said one should show proper etiquette...

t_ch: 往后，我还想常来列车上叨扰。希望那个时候，也能和老师们一起聊聊天、看看宇宙、吃些好吃的……
t_en: I think I'll be coming to the Express more often in the future... The next time I'm here, I want to have more conversations, watch the universe, and eat some good food together with all of you!

t_ch: 「天外之境」…原来《奇谭》里说的都是真的啊……
t_en: Satelleden... So everything in the Tale series is true...

t_ch: 这就是…阿尔乔姆见过的风景吗？
t_en: Is this... what Artem saw?

t_ch: 小说里说的都是真的。
t_en: Everything in the series is true.

t_ch: 可是…《奇谭》的作者怎么会知道这些？
t_en: But... how did the author know about this?

t_ch: 我们贝洛伯格人已经足足七百年没有踏入高墙之外，更别说天上了……！
t_en: We Belobogians haven't set foot beyond the walls for over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, let alone venture into the sky...!

t_ch: 「天外之境」另有他处。
t_en: This isn't Satelleden.

t_ch: 真的？！那真正的「天外之境」在哪里？我有机会跟着列车去看看吗？
t_en: Really!? Then where is the real Satelleden? Will I have the chance to go see it with the Express?

t_ch: 没想到你还看这种小说…
t_en: I didn't think you'd read novels like those...

t_ch: …看这种小说怎么了！没看过《奇谭》的灵魂是不完整的！
t_en: ...What's wrong with those novels? You're not complete unless you've read the Tale series!

t_ch: …咳咳。不好意思，失态了。我刚才什么都没说。
t_en: ...Ahem, sorry. Excuse me. Just pretend I didn't say anything.

t_ch: 谢谢你邀请我登上列车。我就自己随意转转吧，不用劳您大驾专门陪我了。
t_en: Thank you for inviting me to board the Express. I'll take a look around on my own. You don't have to accompany me.

t_ch: 真不用我带着你转转？
t_en: You don't want me to show you around?

t_ch: 真不用，让我一个人静静吧。再见！
t_en: You really don't have to. I'd like to hang out on my own. Bye!

t_ch: 阿尔乔姆见过的风景……
t_en: What Artem saw...

t_ch: 嗯嗯，你说得对，我怎么没想到呢？真是太棒了。
t_en: Mm, you're right. How come I didn't think of this? This is awesome.

t_ch: 诶诶，真的吗真的吗？我都没有听说过那种数据统计技巧，你给我详细说说好不好？
t_en: Huh, really? I've never heard of that data analysis technique. Can you elaborate on that?

t_ch: 啊呀，你来了呀？
t_en: Aha, it's you!

t_ch: 你还挺忙的。
t_en: You seem busy.

t_ch: 诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？
t_en: Oh? Do I? No, I'm really not.

t_ch: 没打扰你吧？
t_en: Am I interrupting anything?

t_ch: 诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？
t_en: Oh? No no, you're really not.

t_ch: 我有些事情想问你…
t_en: I have a few questions for you...

t_ch: 嗯嗯，好的好的，嗯嗯。
t_en: Mmm, sure sure.

t_ch: 你现在的说话方式…
t_en: The way you talk now...

t_ch: 怎么样？是不是已经不会感觉到咄咄逼人的气势，也不会觉得话题被聊死无法进行了？
t_en: How is it? You don't feel I'm so aggressive and difficult to talk to anymore, right?

t_ch: 这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
t_en: That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!

t_ch: 研究课题进度如何？
t_en: How's your research?

t_ch: 诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
t_en: It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.

t_ch: 不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
t_en: But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.

t_ch: 关于你姐姐莱斯莉…
t_en: About your sister Lesley...

t_ch: 你怎么还是来问我有关她的事情？！啊…不好意思，情绪有点激动啦。我的意思是想说，关于姐姐的事情，你可以问问其他人哦。
t_en: Why are you still talking to me about her!? Ah... I'm sorry. I got a bit too excited. I mean, you can ask other people about my sister.

t_ch: 其实非要说到姐姐的话，也都还好啦。她确实很厉害呢，是的是的。
t_en: If you really want to talk about her... I guess that's fine. Yes, yes, she really is impressive.

t_ch: 还是不聊了…
t_en: Let's stop here...

t_ch: 还是…不打扰你了。
t_en: I'll... leave you to it.

t_ch: 嗯，没有啦没有啦，都还好的。嗯嗯！
t_en: No no. I'm all good. I really am!

t_ch: 啊呀，你来了呀？
t_en: Aha, it's you!

t_ch: 我有些事情想问你…
t_en: I have a few questions for you...

t_ch: 嗯嗯，好的好的，嗯嗯。
t_en: Mmm, sure sure.

t_ch: 你现在的说话方式…
t_en: The way you talk now...

t_ch: 怎么样？是不是已经不会感觉到咄咄逼人的气势，也不会觉得话题被聊死无法进行了？
t_en: How is it? You don't feel I'm so aggressive and difficult to talk to anymore, right?

t_ch: 这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
t_en: That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!

t_ch: 研究课题进度如何？
t_en: How's your research?

t_ch: 诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
t_en: It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.

t_ch: 不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
t_en: But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.

t_ch: 你说话能不能正常点…
t_en: Can't you talk, like, normally...
